target.title: feat: add tool search directory mode
target.body:
## Summary
- Add `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` so large catalogs can expose a compact prompt directory plus `tool_describe`/`tool_call` controls while deferring most schemas.
- Hydrate likely or requested directory tools from the catalog, including missing tool calls, while preserving sequential execution contracts.
- Keep client tools directly visible in directory mode and document the new mode.

Fork attribution: based on JuanHuaXu/openclaw `codex/tool-search-directory-mode`, compared from `codex/fix-post-tool-continuation-guard`.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `git diff --check`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Merge-refresh proof at `796472c699`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.
- Hosted Crabbox/Testbox live E2E: `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791

- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts src/agents/anthropic-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/simple-completion-runtime.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
- Deferred-replay fix at `1d8fca0082`: `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=gpt-5.5 --thinking codex=high` returned clean: no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: `tools.toolSearch.mode: "directory"` keeps authorized catalog schemas deferred while preserving normal validation, hooks, execution, result normalization, replay, and provider continuation. Exact head `bd02d984bddc50af4c7dcd510cce4509527208bf` also bounds prompt/catalog scoring, separates native capability guidance from live dispatch/replay sets, fails closed for empty explicit directory client allowlists, limits hidden capability guidance to directory mode, and leaves valid tool names untouched when Tool Search is disabled.
- Real environment tested: Exact head `bd02d984bddc50af4c7dcd510cce4509527208bf` was tested from the isolated PR worktree against current `upstream/main` (`69bf333dde5043b05a117381946ef91d01aed3cc`). Azure Crabbox exact-head runs `run_00ee764ced3d` / `cbx_455444aef664` and `run_ab606970d59a` / `cbx_e9f3bde16d80` synced this SHA and built/packed the product, but both stopped before the model turn because the secret-backed hydrate produced no `OPENAI_API_KEY`. Both Azure leases were released. The earlier hosted live Testbox proof remains feature-head-only: `tbx_01ktppx0dxxps5rf2qtzhg4jwy`, https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/27223948791.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.tool-search-run-plan.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/system-prompt.test.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts src/agents/tool-search.test.ts packages/agent-core/src/agent-loop.test.ts src/agents/tool-allowlist-guard.test.ts src/config/schema.test.ts`; scoped `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs` over the changed Tool Search, agent-loop, run-plan, and prompt surfaces; `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`; `git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=kepler-alpha --thinking codex=high`. Azure used `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider azure --label pr-91632-final-head-hidden-directory-secret-helper --shell -- '<assert exact head; enable directory mode in the remote-only fixture; replace the fixture description with opaque text; replace the prompt so it names no target; require the deferred-hydration log; openclaw-testbox-env env CI=1 OPENCLAW_LIVE_PLUGIN_TOOL_PROFILE_FILE="$HOME/.openclaw-testbox-live.profile" corepack pnpm test:docker:live-plugin-tool>'`.
- Evidence after fix:

```text
Current head: bd02d984bddc50af4c7dcd510cce4509527208bf
Current upstream/main: 69bf333dde5043b05a117381946ef91d01aed3cc
Focused Vitest: 4 shards, 7 files, 216 tests passed
Scoped oxlint: passed
Scoped oxfmt: passed
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD: passed
git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD: passed
Persisted Kepler autoreview session: 019ebdba-5551-7761-b473-b012750612d2
Persisted Kepler autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
overall: patch is correct (0.86)

Azure exact-head attempt 1:
provider=azure run=run_00ee764ced3d lease=cbx_455444aef664
Exact head assertion: passed
Product build/package/tarball integrity: passed
Blocked before model turn: OPENAI_API_KEY was not available after hydrate
Cleanup: lease released

Azure exact-head attempt 2:
provider=azure run=run_ab606970d59a lease=cbx_e9f3bde16d80
Exact head assertion: passed
Secret helper: present and invoked
Product build/package/tarball integrity: passed
Blocked before model turn: hydrated profile still contained no OPENAI_API_KEY
Cleanup: lease released
```

- Observed result after fix: Exact-head deterministic proof covers directory catalog construction, deferred exact-name hydration through the normal agent loop, dispatch/replay/capability boundaries, explicit-allowlist failure behavior, disabled-mode behavior, and current-main integration. The attempted exact-head hosted scenario reached the packaged product on Azure, but provider authentication was unavailable before the model call, so this update does not claim exact-head live directory execution or continuation.
- What was not tested: Exact-head hosted live directory lookup, deferred execution, and provider continuation remain blocked by missing OpenAI credentials in the available Azure hydrate; Blacksmith Testbox was also unavailable to this actor. Maintainers still need to decide whether the third persisted mode and generic `resolveDeferredTool` agent-core/session callback are the intended permanent compatibility boundary. No mobile, Desktop, or Telegram-visible behavior changed.
